title: Taope Floral Foam 3 Pcs, Green Sponge Block for Artificial & Fresh Flowers, Square Wet & Dry Foam Bricks for Flower Arrangements, Indoor and Outdoor Floral Displays, Weddings and Funeral Arrangements
features: 【Value Package】Includes 3 PCS floral foam (Size: about 7.9 * 3.5 * 2.4''inches). The floral foam bricks are perfectly durable enough to maintain the weight of any crafts you put on it, yet versatile enough to put some flowers or sticks inside.

【Premium Foam Bricks】 TAOPE dry floral foam are made of green flower foam, which have the features of soft, durable and easy to absorb water. These florist foam can keep fresh cut flowers hydrated and lasts longer.

【Wet & Dry Floral Foam】These rectangular floral foam can be used for artificial silk flower directly, after absorbing water, also can make fresh flowers hold moisture. You should not press the floral foam bricks with your hand when it is absorbing water, which will lead to insufficient suction.

【Easy to Cut】TAOPE floral foam bricks fits in most containers and is easy to customize! Floral Foam can be cut into different shapes and sizes, put these flower foam into water slightly and wait for one minute until it absorbed water fully.

【Various Application】Ideal green floral foam block are suitable for fresh and artificial flower arrangement, succulent plant, bouquets and other diy crafts in home, wedding, hotel and florist. TAOPE Floral Foam also can be used in a vase, DIY flower baskets, or packed bouquets.If you have any problems after receiving the flower clay can tell us, we will be the first time to provide you with a return service, until you are satisfied!
